session_47.title: The Fall of Thornkeep's Shadow
session_47.summary: The party finally confronted Lord Malachar in his sanctum beneath the old cemetery. After a brutal battle involving summoned demons and blood magic, they managed to destroy his phylactery and end his reign of terror. However, they discovered disturbing evidence that he was merely a lieutenant in the Crimson Hand's hierarchy. Captain Mira was gravely wounded but stabilized. The city celebrates, but dark times may lie ahead.
key_events: Infiltrated the cemetery crypts using Valdris's intelligence
Fought through undead guardians and trapped corridors
Discovered Malachar's laboratory with detailed plans for a larger ritual
Epic boss battle - Malachar transformed into a demon-hybrid form
Destroyed the Crimson Phylactery, weakening Crimson Hand operations in the region
Found a coded message referring to 'The Awakening' in three months
loot: A black crystal pulsing with dark energy (purpose unknown)
character_moments: Theron's divine smite dealt the killing blow to Malachar
Aria's clever use of Dispel Magic prevented a TPK
Grim discovered his family connection to the Crimson Hand
Lyra stabilized Captain Mira with a clutch Medicine check
next_session_hooks: Deal with power vacuum in criminal underworld
Captain Mira's recovery and potential recruitment mission

session_46.title: Gathering Storms
session_46.summary: The party gathered intelligence on Lord Malachar's whereabouts, infiltrated the Blackstone Prison to interrogate a captured Crimson Hand operative, and formed an alliance with Valdris and the Silver Company for the final assault.
key_events: Prison break investigation led to Crimson Hand connection
War council with Valdris, Mira, and council members
Gathered magical supplies and prepared for assault
Discovered Mira had been investigating Crimson Hand independently
